attacking_style: Favors long-range attacks (10-30km from finish) on mountain stages rather than final-kilometer explosions. Typically moves when domestique support ends or on penultimate climbs, exploiting hesitation in GC groups. Shows patience in breakaways, attacking with 1-3km remaining on summit finishes.
team_tactics: Often released from GC support duties to hunt stages/KOM points, particularly when down on time. INEOS/Movistar uses him for bonus second hunting and break policing. When leading GC, relies on defensive riding and perfect positioning rather than dominant domestique trains.
terrain_preference: Excels on sustained high-altitude climbs and steep gradients (15%+). Vulnerable on flat time trials (consistently loses 1:30-3:00 to specialists) and power-based uphill sprints under 200m. Wet descents show inconsistency despite historical reputation.
vulnerability: Time trials remain catastrophic weakness (lost podium at 2022 Giro, 1:44 down in 2021 Tour). Lacks explosive kick in uphill sprints under 500m against pure puncheurs. Post-Olympic fatigue evident (2021 Vuelta collapse). Poor pacing judgment on consecutive Cat 1 climbs.
key_patterns: Attacks from breakaways 1-4km from summit rather than GC group accelerations (9 observations)
Hunts KOM points aggressively when released from GC duties, often winning stages simultaneously (6 observations)
Takes intermediate sprint bonuses on flat stages for GC positioning, unusual tactical awareness (3 observations)
Loses 5-49 seconds on wet mountain descents despite wet-weather climbing reputation (3 observations)
Mistimes uphill sprints when attacking 200-700m out, stronger with longer efforts or waiting (4 observations)
Performs tactical sacrifice work marking rivals when supporting teammates, compromising own GC (4 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed sporadic brilliance (Dauphine bridging efforts, Il Lombardia top-10) but lacked team support depth at INEOS. Post-2022 Vuelta KOM success, pattern suggests stage-hunting freedom produces better results than GC leadership pressure.
